# Marián Figula — Full-Stack Web Developer Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Marián Figula, a Full-Stack Web Developer from Bratislava, Slovakia.
> Site: https://marianfigula.com

## About

Marián Figula (also known as Majo Figula) is a Full-Stack Web Developer with 3+ years of experience, graduated from the Faculty of Electrical Engineering and Information Technology at STU Bratislava. He specializes in modern web technologies including React, JavaScript, PHP, and Laravel.

## Skills

- **Programming Languages:** JavaScript, TypeScript, PHP, Python, SQL, HTML, CSS
- **Frameworks & Libraries:** React, Laravel, Tailwind CSS, Node.js
- **Tools:** Git, Docker, Vite
- **Domains:** Full-Stack Development, UI/UX Design, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence

## Projects

### Professional / Real-World Projects
- **Stribog** — Real-world web application
- **Instaview** — Real-world web application
- **Everlution** — Real-world web application
- **Resap** — Real-world web application

### Personal Projects
- **ScandiTrack** — Personal productivity/tracking application
- **Clipboard PDF Text Changer** — Tool for manipulating PDF text via clipboard
- **TickTick Chrome Extension** — Browser extension for the TickTick task manager
